reviews.review_description:
MazeRunner VR offers a fun mix of fast-paced sci-fi action and strategic maze exploration. Each level pushes you to think quickly as you search for the required items while dodging or fighting off a range of monsters. The variety of weapons adds good flexibility to your playstyle, and the core loop—collect, survive, escape—already feels satisfying.

Since it’s in Early Access, there’s plenty of potential for more depth, enemy variety, and maze complexity. Looking forward to seeing how the game evolves with future updates!

developer_response.body: Thank you for your insightful feedback! We're thrilled to hear you're enjoying the core loop and weapon flexibility in MazeRunner VR. Your points on adding depth, enemy variety, and maze complexity are spot-on—these are key areas we're actively developing for future updates. Stay tuned for more sci-fi adventures, and keep the suggestions coming! 🚀
